system.powerDescription:
You can yank and tug on the leylines beneath the ground, causing direct responses from the earth. You may choose from any of the following effects; 

• Create a CAT-1 size pit that goes CAT yards down. 
• Create a two-yard dip in the earth in CAT area. 
• Create a two-yard high hill in CAT area. 
• Create a CAT-1 size pillar that goes CAT yards up. 

These alterations are sudden, but not violent. This power may affect the parameters of rolls, such as difficulty and risk.
